title: Aging pack
description: A datapack that adds an aging system - players spawn as a young adult or get born to other players and age with real time. Recommended for multiplayer servers.
body:
**Agingpack 1.21.7-26.1**
---------------------------------
_Originally an addon for my other [datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tales-of-silta). Now standalone and published._

_You can join our server to try it out. (through discord for now)_
---------------------------------
This datapack adds a aging system - upon spawning you will be given the options to spawn as a 20 y/o or as a 0 y/o baby to another player.

The datapack will start to count the days since your birth and make you age up to 80 years. At that time you will die of old age. 

Custom structure can spawn on mushroom islands that can transfer ones age to the other player

Life stages:
- 
- baby - 25% of normal stats, cannot jump or ride horses
- child - 50% of normal stats
- young - 75% of normal stats
- adult - normal stats, can have children
- senior - 95% of normal stats slower
- elderly - 90% of normal stats, much slower

Using /trigger aging_info will give you a short summary of your age, fertility and life count
Using /trigger toggle_fertility will toggle your ability to have children

! this datapack disables vanilla spawnpoints (bed etc)
---------------------------------------
Required:
/gamerule doDaylightCycle true 

**do not use /time set .... this resets to day 0 making everybody babies**
